1.text: A solid blow to the torso steals the breath from the target's lungs. He can only take a Half Action on his next turn.

2.text: The impact punches the air from the target's body. He suffers 1 level of Fatigue and is knocked Prone.

3.text: The blow breaks a rib with a resounding crack. The target is Stunned for 1 round and knocked Prone.

4.text: The crushing blow shatters one or more ribs. The target suffers [[1d5]] levels of Fatigue and must make a Challenging (+0) Agility test or be knocked Prone. He is Stunned for 1 round.

5.text: A heavy blow to the chest pulverises the target's innards. He is Stunned for 2 rounds, suffers Blood Loss, and must make a Challenging (+0) Toughness test or suffer [[1d5]] levels of Fatigue. Permanently reduce his Toughness characteristic by 1.

6.text: The attack sends the target sprawling. He suffers [[1d5]] levels of Fatigue, is flung [[1d5]] metres from the attacker, and falls Prone. He is Stunned for 2 rounds and suffers Blood Loss. Permanently reduce his Toughness characteristic by [[1d5]].

7.text: With a sickening crunch, [[1d5]] of the target's ribs shatter. He suffers Blood Loss and [[1d10]] levels of Fatigue. Permanently reduce his Toughness characteristic by [[1d5]]. Until he receives medical attention, at the end of each round in which this character took an action, roll [[1d10]]. On a result of 1 or 2, he dies instantly as a shattered rib pierces a vital organ.

8.text: The blow ruptures several of the target's internal organs, knocking him to the ground in wretched agony. He suffers Blood Loss and [[1d10]] levels of Fatigue. Permanently reduce his Toughness characteristic by [[1d10]]. He must make a Hard (–20) Toughness test or die.

9.text: The target jerks backwards from the terrible force of the blow, throwing back his head and vomiting blood before collapsing dead on the ground.

10.text: The target is smashed apart by the tremendous blow, ribcage cracking open and organs pulverised. He is slain instantly. His lifeless form is hurled [[1d10]] metres from the attacker. Any character in the corpse's path must make a Challenging (+0) Agility test or be knocked Prone.
